title: Yellow XP
description: Changes the colour of the XP bar and XP orbs to yellow.
body:
# Yellow XP
This texture pack changes the colour of the XP bar and the XP orbs. The XP bottles are also coloured yellow.

![Yellow XP](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0cca97da0c4bcdbb09d425ef9bb3027d176d5030.png) 


![https://optifine.net/downloads](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/79528f9c1dbbdc8ce4b03edffb9850ff7c58e171.png) 
or use [Animatica](https://modrinth.com/mod/animatica)

**This Texture Pack [Requires Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads)!** 

**Thank you for 1k downloads!**


Made with [Enchanted Games - CustomXP](https://enchanted.games/app/custom-xp/)

```
©️Hostet by x_halo's project host.
```
